_comment: MPP PRVE research_dossier template — the problem must be understood before it can be solved.
problem_statement: One precise paragraph: what is broken or missing, why it matters, what 'done' looks like.

claims.claim: Assertion that must be true for the solution to work (will be checked against SEE_CITATION_MAP)

code_shapes: describe the architectural patterns your code uses — e.g. 'retry loop around external API call', 'message queue consumer', 'cache read/write/invalidate'
each shape triggers a pattern library lookup at MMD; matched patterns must be addressed or waived in MMD_REPORT.json::pattern_checks
leave as empty list [] if the change has no relevant architectural patterns (e.g. pure refactor, documentation)
